bioprojects.title: Trichoderma asperellum CBS 433.97 Genome sequencing and assembly

description.title: Generic sample from Trichoderma asperellum CBS 433.97

owner.name: Joint Genome Institute, U.S. Department of Energy

assembly_info.comments:
URL -- http://genome.jgi.doe.gov/Trias1
JGI Project ID: 403726
The DNA was provided by Irina Druzhinina (Irina.druzhinina@tuwien@ac.at)
The strain is available from CBS-KNAW Fungal Biodiversity Centre (http://www.cbs.knaw.nl)
Contacts: Irina Druzhinina (Irina.druzhinina@tuwien@ac.at)
Assembly and annotation done by JGI.
The JGI and collaborators endorse the principles for the distribution and use of large scale sequencing data adopted by the larger genome sequencing community and urge users of this data to follow them. It is our intention to publish the work of this project in a timely fashion and we welcome collaborative interaction on the project and analysis.
(http://www.genome.gov/page.cfm?pageID=10506376)

This genome was sequenced as a part of several large-scale projects supported by the Austrian Science Fund (FWF): project number P 25613 B20 , Wiener Wissenschafts-, Forschungs- und Technologie fonds project number WWTF-LS13-048, U.S. Department of Energy Joint Genome Institute Contract No. DE-AC02-05CH11231, National Nature Science Foundation of China (31330069), and Chinese Ministry of Science and Technology (973 Program, 2015CB150500), in a collaborative effort led by Dr. Christian P Kubicek, Dr. Igor Grigoriev, Dr. Qireng Shen and Dr. Irina S Druzhinina.
genome_notes: superseded by newer assembly for species

paired_assembly.annotation_name: Annotation submitted by DOE Joint Genome Institute

assembly_info.suppression_reason: This RefSeq record was removed as a result of standard genome annotation processing. Contact info@ncbi.nlm.nih.gov for further information.

annotation_info.name: Annotation submitted by DOE Joint Genome Institute
